_comment: APEX Workflow Library — pre-built recipes for common tasks. Each workflow defines phases that the architect can adopt directly.

workflows.name: Add Authentication
workflows.description: JWT or session-based auth with login, register, and protected routes

workflows.name: Add Stripe Payments
workflows.description: Stripe checkout, webhooks, subscription management

workflows.name: Migrate to PostgreSQL
workflows.description: Switch from SQLite/other DB to PostgreSQL with data migration

workflows.name: Add API Rate Limiting
workflows.description: Per-user and per-endpoint rate limiting with Redis or in-memory store

workflows.name: Setup CI/CD Pipeline
workflows.description: GitHub Actions or similar with test, lint, build, deploy stages

workflows.name: Prepare for Production
workflows.description: Environment hardening, security, performance, observability, and deployment readiness

workflows.name: Accessibility Audit
workflows.description: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance audit and remediation for web applications

workflows.name: Add Testing
workflows.description: Unit, integration, and E2E test setup with CI integration

workflows.name: Setup Monitoring
workflows.description: Health checks, metrics, dashboards, and alerting for production systems

workflows.name: Add Logging
workflows.description: Structured centralized logging with request correlation and log aggregation

workflows.name: Add Caching
workflows.description: In-memory or distributed caching with invalidation strategies

workflows.name: Deploy to Cloud
workflows.description: Cloud deployment with infrastructure, CI/CD pipeline, and production validation

workflows.name: Add Docker
workflows.description: Containerize application with Dockerfile, docker-compose, and production optimization

workflows.name: Setup Database
workflows.description: Database connection, schema design, migrations, seed data, and data access layer

workflows.name: Add Search
workflows.description: Full-text search with indexing, relevance tuning, and autocomplete

workflows.name: Add WebSockets
workflows.description: Real-time communication with rooms, reconnection, and multi-server broadcasting

workflows.name: Add File Uploads
workflows.description: File upload with cloud storage, validation, thumbnails, and virus scanning

workflows.name: Add Email Notifications
workflows.description: Transactional email with templates, delivery tracking, and bounce handling

workflows.name: Add Internationalization
workflows.description: Multi-language support with locale detection, translations, and RTL

workflows.name: Add Role-Based Access Control
workflows.description: Roles, permissions, authorization middleware, and admin management

workflows.name: Add GraphQL API
workflows.description: GraphQL schema, resolvers, auth integration, and DataLoader optimization

workflows.name: Setup Error Tracking
workflows.description: Centralized error capture with context enrichment, alerting, and release tracking

workflows.name: Add Background Jobs
workflows.description: Async job processing with queue, retry logic, priorities, and monitoring

workflows.name: Add Feature Flags
workflows.description: Feature flag management with percentage rollout and environment targeting

workflows.name: Migrate to TypeScript
workflows.description: Incremental JavaScript to TypeScript migration with strict mode enforcement

workflows.name: Add OAuth Social Login
workflows.description: Google, GitHub, Facebook social login with account linking

workflows.name: Add PDF Generation
workflows.description: Template-based PDF creation for invoices, reports, and documents

workflows.name: Setup SSL/HTTPS
workflows.description: SSL certificate provisioning, HTTPS enforcement, and security headers

workflows.name: Add API Documentation
workflows.description: OpenAPI/Swagger spec generation with interactive documentation playground

workflows.name: Add Data Export
workflows.description: CSV, Excel, JSON export with streaming for large datasets and async generation
